rooms.name: Lantern Yard
rooms.description: The rain over Camelot tastes faintly of iron. Squires trade rumors beside a shrine of old river-stone.

rooms.name: Old Bridge
rooms.description: A bridge older than the crown leans over black water. Someone has scratched a Greek oath into one stone.

rooms.name: Market Under
rooms.description: Below the respectable stalls, charm-sellers auction debts, curses, and maps that disagree with themselves.
